# Transcrição Completa: Why You Should Text Every Lead Manually

 

[00:00] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO

─────────────────────────────

**TEXTO:** "10 Why You Should Text Every Lead Manually"

**NÚMEROS:** None

**VISUAL:** Título com ícones de textos manuais vs automatizados

 

[00:02] All right. So listen, it's very important you understand there's a difference between scalable actions and non-scalable actions. Non-scalable actions in sales specifically work really well with the statistics that we want to heavily influence.

 

[00:15] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO

─────────────────────────────

**TEXTO:** "Scalable vs Non-Scalable Actions"

**NÚMEROS:** None

**VISUAL:** Comparação lado a lado entre ações escaláveis e não-escaláveis

 

[00:20] I'll give you a few examples. When I send a selfie text video, I am substantially influencing the individual to connect with me at a much higher rate than if I just did a normal manual text.

 

[00:30] Because remember, we don't know if they're interpreting it as an automated text, like thinking you're just a chatbot or something. But when we do a selfie video text, they know you're a real person.

 

[00:40] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO

─────────────────────────────

**TEXTO:** "Selfie Video Results"

**NÚMEROS:** 10-30 seconds per video, 100 leads = 2 hours

**VISUAL:** Pessoa real vs chatbot, taxas de resposta aumentando

 

[00:45] We're all of a sudden having a much higher response rate to our texts and to our calls when we are getting on the phones with individuals and trying to sell them. Non-scalable action though. It's something that takes 10 to 30 seconds to do.

 

[01:00] And when we have, you know, 100 people a day that we have to do that for, that's all of a sudden like two hours worth of activity in itself.

 

[01:10] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO

─────────────────────────────

**TEXTO:** "Time Investment Trade-off"

**NÚMEROS:** 2 hours selfie videos vs 2 one-hour scheduled calls

**VISUAL:** Balança comparando tempo gasto vs qualidade de conexão

 

[01:15] You have to be very sold that doing that type of activity for that amount of time in a day, technically it takes away two hours worth of one-hour scheduled calls you could have done, but it heavily influences the people who you have scheduled calls with or that you're doing follow-up with to be sold upon having those conversations. It makes a substantial difference.

 

[01:35] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO

─────────────────────────────

**TEXTO:** "Scalable Actions: Marketing Automation"

**NÚMEROS:** None

**VISUAL:** Emails automatizados, textos automatizados, ads de retargeting

 

[01:40] Not every non-scalable action is going to be efficient. That's why we call them non-scalable actions. Scalable actions, marketing automation, automated texts, automated emails, the stuff that I, as a marketer, can help implement your sales process.

 

[01:55] That's going to, yes, influence people to buy more, but not everybody's going to watch that stuff. Not everybody's going to read that stuff. Not everybody's going to open those things. They're easier to ignore.

 

[02:05] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO

─────────────────────────────

**TEXTO:** "Salesperson = Highest Probability"

**NÚMEROS:** None

**VISUAL:** Vendedor com destaque como elemento mais efetivo do processo

 

[02:10] I could do a bunch of retargeting ads and shove content into the news feed to get in front of people while you're in your follow-up process. They might see a few of them, and that might influence them to at least respond to you more.

 

[02:20] You, as the salesperson, have the highest probability of actually being seen, of being heard when we're in our sales process. And it's very important you understand that role.

 

[02:30] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO

─────────────────────────────

**TEXTO:** "Non-Scalable = Inefficient but Very Effective"

**NÚMEROS:** None

**VISUAL:** Fórmula mostrando ineficiência vs efetividade

 

[02:35] I just want to be clear, non-scalable actions, although inefficient, are very effective. That's why we do them.

 

**🔥 ANÁLISE FURION POWER: Jeremy revela a VERDADE BRUTAL que separa vendedores mediocres dos DOMINANTES! Enquanto preguiçosos se escondem atrás da automação, GUERREIROS investem 2 horas em conexões reais que DESTROEM a competição. Jeremy entende que eficiência não é sempre efetividade - às vezes você precisa SANGRAR tempo para DOMINAR resultados. O vendedor é a ARMA mais poderosa do arsenal, não um robô!**
